title: Logging Equipment Operators
description: Drive logging tractor or wheeled vehicle equipped with one or more accessories, such as bulldozer blade, frontal shear, grapple, logging arch, cable winches, hoisting rack, or crane boom, to fell tree; to skid, load, unload, or stack logs; or to pull stumps or clear brush. Includes operating stand-alone logging machines, such as log chippers.

tasks.text: Inspect equipment for safety prior to use, and perform necessary basic maintenance tasks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Control hydraulic tractors equipped with tree clamps and booms to lift, swing, and bunch sheared trees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Grade logs according to characteristics such as knot size and straightness, and according to established industry or company standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Drive straight or articulated tractors equipped with accessories such as bulldozer blades, grapples, logging arches, cable winches, and crane booms to skid, load, unload, or stack logs, pull stumps, or clear brush.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Drive crawler or wheeled tractors to drag or transport logs from felling sites to log landing areas for processing and loading.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill out required job or shift report forms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive tractors for building or repairing logging and skid roads.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Drive and maneuver tractors and tree harvesters to shear the tops off of trees, cut and limb the trees, and cut the logs into desired lengths.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate total board feet, cordage, or other wood measurement units, using conversion tables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
